name: Barry Bennett, BenCarson.com
subject: A story you'll want to hear...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31785092:WUN8FyyNc:m:1:876315805:927AC777FB428B5FE297678B1EFE6416:r)
---

Peter,

The issues facing a President are always changing and the Oval Office can be a lonely place.

When it's time to make decisions that will impact millions of people, it's important to know a President's heart and values. It's comforting to know that decisions are grounded in faith and principle.

Over the course of his medical career, Dr. Carson performed over 15,000 operations. He touched the lives of an incredible amount of families across America and the world, and in doing so they got to know Ben Carson the man. They got to know his heart.

**[We'd like to share one such story with you today. Please take 60 seconds to listen to Christy Wood share her story about her daughter, Isabella. ](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31785092:WUN8FyyNc:m:1:876315805:927AC777FB428B5FE297678B1EFE6416:r)****
**
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31785092:WUN8FyyNc:m:1:876315805:927AC777FB428B5FE297678B1EFE6416:r)
---
Once you've taken a moment to [watch this video](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31785092:WUN8FyyNc:m:1:876315805:927AC777FB428B5FE297678B1EFE6416:r), we hope you'll share it with your friends and family and [make a small donation](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31785092:WUN8FyyNc:m:1:876315805:927AC777FB428B5FE297678B1EFE6416:r) so we can share Christy's story with millions more.

Thank you for your time, and have a great weekend.

Sincerely,

Barry Bennett
Campaign Manager

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31785092:WUN8FyyNc:m:1:876315805:927AC777FB428B5FE297678B1EFE6416:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31785093:WUN8FyyNc:m:1:876315805:927AC777FB428B5FE297678B1EFE6416:r)
---
|

name: Bill Simon
subject: Friend, is this right?
body:
Friend - On Monday morning I'm sending the Governor and the rest of the team "The List."

That list is the name of every person who has donated to the campaign, and, unfortunately, I noticed that your name was still missing from our November List.

[**This is the final update I will give Jeb and the rest of our team before the Holidays, so I hope you'll update your status before midnight tomorrow with a gift of just $1 right now.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/owzgskqnmlwdfpftdkvgmdcpqqdcnpsngkrkwnpzqkzz_jmqvvfns.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

With 71 days until the Iowa Caucuses, every day you stand on the sideline means less resources to reach the voters we need to. [**That 's why it's so important that you chip in just $1 before midnight tomorrow.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/smbfwcphlkmtjgjbtcdfltzgpptzhgwhfcscmhgrpcrv_jmqvvfns.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

If you don't step up before tomorrow, the Governor will be following up personally with everyone not on this list. Please, Friend, step up and get on the list now: [**Jeb2016.com/Stand-with-Jeb**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/tvwfsbprjcvkwtwlkbgfjkdtppkdrtsrfbmbvrtzpbzb_jmqvvfns.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/krpkwrpqfsvjtztljrgkfjbzppjbqzwqkrdrvqzhprhv_jmqvvfns.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)
Thank you,

Bill Simon
Treasurer
Jeb 2016, Inc.

Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=5792&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)
